explanation: I've created a comprehensive support dashboard for this week's open tickets. It includes key metrics like open and overdue ticket counts, ticket distribution by status, recent activity, and agent availability. The dashboard provides a complete view of your current support operations with actionable insights.

widgets.title: Support Operations — Open Tickets This Week
widgets.subtitle: Current ticket status, resolution progress, and team availability

widgets.title: Key Insight
widgets.subtitle: Monitor overdue tickets closely — they impact customer satisfaction more than raw volume. Focus on reducing backlog during peak hours.

quickActions.label: Add Call Volume Metrics
quickActions.prompt: Add today's call metrics from Freshcaller to this dashboard

quickActions.label: Add Chat Support Data
quickActions.prompt: Include active chat conversations from Freshchat

quickActions.label: Filter to High Priority Only
quickActions.prompt: Show only high priority or urgent tickets

issues.message: Data source 'freshdesk_open_ticket_count' does not exist. Should use 'freshdesk_tickets_by_status' with filters for status='open'.
Missing time filter for 'this week' requirement. Widget shows all-time open tickets instead of tickets created this week.
Data source 'freshdesk_overdue_ticket_count' does not exist in available data sources.
User requested 'this week's open tickets' - overdue tickets are scope creep beyond the specific request.
User requested dashboard for 'this week's open Freshdesk tickets' - agent availability is completely out of scope and does not address tickets data.
User requested dashboard for 'this week's open Freshdesk tickets' - total agent count is completely unrelated to ticket data and entirely out of scope.
User requested 'this week's open tickets' but widget shows all statuses for all time. Should filter to tickets created this week and focus on open status.
Missing time filter for current week requirement. Widget configuration lacks temporal filtering.
User requested 'this week's open tickets' but widget shows recent activity across all statuses and timeframes, not filtered to open tickets from this week.
Data source 'freshdesk_recent_tickets' may not be filtered appropriately for week constraint and open status filter.
User requested dashboard for 'this week's open Freshdesk tickets' - support team availability is entirely out of scope and does not provide ticket information.
